  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    BrowseSecondHandProducts
    This class provides functionality to browse and retrieve second-hand products available in the store.
    Cart
    Cart, array of products and packs the user has not paid yet
    Category
    It implements the categories
    CategoryDiscount
    It implements the general discount for those with Category coverage
    CategoryDiscountFactory
    It implements the factory for those with category coverage
    CategoryFixedPercentage
    It implements the Category discount whose type is Fixed Percentage
    CategoryGift
    It implements the Category discount whose type is Gift
    CategoryQuantity
    It implements the Category discount whose type is Quantity
    CategoryVolume
    It implements the Category discount whose type is Volume
    Comic
    It implements the comic store product type
    ComposedPack
    It implements the composed packs
    ConservationStatus
    It defines the conservations status
    Discount
    It implements the general discount
    DiscountCoverage
    It defines the discount coverages
    DiscountFactory
    It defines the base discount constructors (without specific coverage)
    DiscountType
    It defines the discount types
    Employee
    It implements the employee
    EmployeeLoop
    It implements the general employee's loop
    Exchange
    It implements the exchange
    ExchangeDemo
    Demo for an exchange
    ExchangeHistory
    It implements the exchange history
    ExchangePermission
    It implements the permission that allows an employee to manage Exchanges
    ExchangePermissionLoop
    It implements the exchange permission's loop
    Figurine
    It implements the figurines
    FixedPercentageDiscount
    It defines the base Fixed Percentage discount's methods
    Game
    It implements the game store product type
    GameStyle
    It defines the game's possible styles
    GiftDiscount
    It defines the base Gift discount's methods
    Loop
    It implements the general loop
    MainApp
    It implements the main app
    MainLoop
    It implements the app's main loop
    Manager
    It implements the manager of the store
    ManagerLoop
    It implements the manager's loop
    Notification
    It implements the notification
    NotificationDiscount
    It implements the discount notification
    NotificationEmployeeExchange
    It implements the exchange notification for employees
    NotificationEmployeeOrder
    It implements the order notification for employees
    NotificationEmployeeValuation
    It implements the valuation notification for employees
    NotificationExchange
    It implements the exchange notification
    NotificationHistory
    It implements the notification history
    NotificationInterface<T>
    /** It implements the notification interface
    NotificationNewSecondHand
    It implements the new second-hand product notification
    NotificationOrder
    It implements the order notification
    NotificationPackCart
    It implements the cart notification for packs
    NotificationPayment
    It implements the payment notification
    NotificationProductCart
    It implements the cart notification for products
    NotificationSettings
    It implements the notification settings
    NotificationType
    It defines the types of notifications
    Offer
    It implements the offers
    OfferHistory
    Description: It implements the offer history
    OfferStatus
    It defines the offer's possible statuses
    Order
    It implements the order paid by the client
    OrderHistory
    It implements the order history of the registered client
    OrderPermission
    It implements the permission that allows an employee to manage Orders
    OrderPermissionLoop
    It implements the order permission's loop
    OrderState
    It defines the order's possible states
    Pack
    It implements the packs
    PackDiscount
    It implements the general discount for those with Pack coverage
    PackDiscountFactory
    It implements the factory for those with pack coverage
    PackFixedPercentage
    It implements the Pack discount whose type is Fixed Percentage
    PackGift
    It implements the Pack discount whose type is Gift
    PackQuantity
    It implements the Pack discount whose type is Quantity
    PackVolume
    It implements the Pack discount whose type is Volume
    Pager
    It implements the store's pager, used for dividing big lists into small sub-lists of a desired size (lines-wise), helpful when browsing (check main)
    Parameter
    It defines the store parameters
    Permission
    It defines the user types
    PriceFilter
    This class represents a price range filter used to limit search results based on a minimum and maximum price.
    Product
    It implements the abstract Product class
    ProductDiscount
    It implements the general discount for those with Product coverage
    ProductDiscountFactory
    It implements the factory for those with store product coverage
    ProductFixedPercentage
    It implements the Product discount whose type is FixedPercentage
    ProductGift
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Gift
    ProductQuantity
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Quantity
    ProductType
    It defines the store product types
    ProductVolume
    It implements the Product discount whose type is Volume
    PunctuationFilter
    This class represents a punctuation (rating) filter used to limit search results based on a minimum and maximum score.
    QuantityDiscount
    It defines the base Quantity discount's methods
    Recommender
    It implements the store's recommender
    RegisteredClient
    It implements the registered client
    RegisteredClientLoop
    It implements the registered client's loop
    RevenueType
    It defines the revenue types
    Review
    It implements the reviews
    SaverLoader
    It implements the store's saver and loader
    SearchEmployee
    This class implements a search mechanism to find employees in the store by their unique identifier (ID).
    Searcher
    This class acts as the main search manager, grouping together all search functionalities available in the package.
    SearchExchange
    This class implements a search mechanism to find exchanges by their ID.
    SearchID
    This interface defines a generic contract for searching objects by their ID.
    SearchOrder
    This class implements a search mechanism to find orders by their ID.
    SearchPack
    This class implements a search mechanism to find packs by their ID.
    SearchStoreProducts
    This class implements product filtering based on price, rating, and category.
    SearchType
    It implements the type of searches that will be done
    SecondHandProduct
    It implements the second-hand products
    SimplePack
    It implements the simple packs
    Statistics
    It implements the statistics
    Store
    It implements the store
    StorePermission
    It implements the store permission of the store
    StorePermissionLoop
    It implements the store permission's loop
    StoreProduct
    It implements the store's products
    TestStorePermission
    Small test for store permission
    UnregisteredClient
    It implements the unregistered client
    UnregisteredClientLoop
    It implements the unregistered client's loop
    User
    It defines the user of the app
    UserType
    It defines the user types
    Utility
    It implements elements such a sign in method and login method which don't belong to either classes
    VolumeDiscount
    It defines the base Volume discount's methods
    Wallet
    It implements the wallet
